schools.name: Reservoir High School
schools.key_recommendation: Construct continuous concrete footpath minimum 1.8m wide

seifa.implication: Active travel dependency above average — investment justified

recommendations.recommendation: Construct continuous concrete footpath minimum 1.8m wide

recommendations.hazard: Nearest crossing too far from school gate
recommendations.recommendation: Install additional pedestrian crossing within 50m of school gate

recommendations.hazard: No traffic calming on multi-lane road near school gate
recommendations.recommendation: Install speed humps or raised intersection table near school gate
Widen footpath to minimum 1.5m — Australian Standard AS 1428.1

recommendations.hazard: No tactile ground surface indicators at crossing
recommendations.recommendation: Install tactile pavers on both sides of all crossings within 400m of gate

recommendations.hazard: No cycling infrastructure on school frontage road
recommendations.recommendation: Install painted bike lane or shared path along school frontage
